microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's **enterprise AI agent platform** from a 2-person operation into a platformized system, standardizing workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across customers including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led **0→1 development** of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining product requirements and self-service scheduling capabilities for developer and operator stakeholders, reducing operational toil by 30% and transitioning execution to a scalable, self-service model.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a new continuous-validation model adopted across enterprise accounts.

Directed 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility, serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a **$1.5B+ enterprise contract**, aligning engineering, design, and leadership stakeholders end-to-end through launch.

Built an **internal AI agent** for drill planning and restructured roadmap workflows using LLM-powered automation, cutting planning cycle time by 39% and increasing drill capacity by 21% — directly informing the platform's next-generation agent data architecture.

Acted as trusted strategic advisor to enterprise customers and forward-deployed teams, translating complex platform capabilities into actionable go-to-market narratives and driving **adoption across 4 major partner integrations** within a single fiscal year.
microsoft_2023: Championed **AI agent adoption** for code-generation workflows across Azure, conducting user demos and training sessions that drove utilization across 14 key engineering teams and saved **37 engineering hours monthly** — directly validating agent value with real developer stakeholders.

Shaped the product roadmap to include **intent-based YAML generation** by facilitating 11+ structured user research interviews with Azure service teams, surfacing critical feature gaps and translating first-principles insights into prioritized, actionable backlog items.

Improved platform data quality and developer experience by implementing rigorous metadata standards and migrating documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search** tool with RAG-based retrieval, cutting lookup time by 83% and reducing friction for 100+ internal users.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched Azure regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework, driving end-to-end roadmap consensus across 140+ engineering and operations teams.

Mobilized a **0→1 product strategy** to reduce operational toil during region launches, conducting discovery interviews with 20+ service teams to surface 81 hours of manual effort per region and building a phased roadmap to automate the highest-impact critical paths.

Enabled leadership to target **automation gaps** and prioritize platform investments by engineering a live Power BI dashboard tracking operational toil signals across 140+ teams — translating raw data into go-to-market and resourcing decisions at the executive level.
amazon_robotics: Defined the **legacy OS migration strategy** for a 2,000+ unit pilot, mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations and coordinating cross-functional execution with IT, Operations, and Engineering to achieve zero operational downtime throughout the transition.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, prioritizing the **developer platform backlog** to resolve 40+ high-priority tickets, stabilize the intake process, and unblock engineering velocity for a time-sensitive robotics deployment.

Drove strategic alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and establishing a repeatable release model for the robotics platform's ongoing agent software updates.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by redesigning the end-to-end customer journey — scoping, proposal, and invoicing — across 200+ monthly engagements via a new CRM workflow, directly improving customer experience outcomes and operational throughput.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and boosted conversion rates by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing the website funnel and Google Business profile to better represent the brand and reach high-intent customers.

Improved leadership pricing decisions by conducting **financial profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records, identifying margin leaks and translating first-principles data into a revised pricing model adopted across the company's service lines.
